policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support during business hours.
policies.trial: We offer a 7-day free trial on both plans with no credit card required.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

product_info.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.
